summary: Console-core has 2 real test files that artifact INFRA-FINDING-001 incorrectly flagged as false positives
details: {"description": "Both test/date.test.ts and test/subscription.test.ts are real bun:test files with substantive test coverage. The artifact's surface map incorrectly categorized them as scripts with 'expect()' matches. Now wired to turbo.json with test and test:ci scripts."}

summary: Enterprise tests require cloud storage credentials (R2/S3) — no local mock adapter
details: {"description": "Enterprise storage adapter only supports r2 and s3 backends requiring OPENCODE_STORAGE_ADAPTER + cloud credentials. No mock/local adapter exists for testing. Tests are integration tests that need real cloud infra. Consider adding a mock adapter for local test runs."}
